E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

UPA CAN Display V1.2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74E
Recv ID: 76E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0E
Func Name: Aide au parking

  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "14FFFFFF",
    "name": "ClearDiagnosticInformation.All",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "shiftbytescount": 4,
    "replybytes": "59020000000000",
    "sentbytes": "1902FF",
    "name": "ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "StatusOfDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailed": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedThisMonitoringCycle": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6
      },
      "DTCStatus.pendingDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 5
      },
      "DTCStatus.confirmedDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },

        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "DTCFailureType.Category": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCFailureType": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "DTCDeviceIdentifier": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCDeviceAndFailureTypeOBD": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "DTCFailureType.ManufacturerOrSupplier": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "DTCStatusAvailabilityMask": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    }
  },
